2026-04-14T00:55:08.8511822Z ---
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8512490Z description: |
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8566237Z   Documentation gap detector for the Azure SDK repository
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8567239Z   Triggered on every push to main, analyzes diffs to identify documentation
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8568150Z   gaps and files GitHub issues for Copilot coding agent to implement
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8568658Z 
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8582071Z on:
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8583036Z   push:
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8583494Z     branches: [main]
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8583947Z   workflow_dispatch:
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8584219Z 
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8584421Z permissions: read-all
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8584700Z 
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8584868Z network: defaults
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8585923Z 
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8586323Z safe-outputs:
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8586793Z   report-failure-as-issue: false
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8587309Z   create-issue:
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8587713Z     max: 1
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8588078Z   noop:
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8588471Z     report-as-issue: false
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8591089Z   jobs:
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8592287Z     dispatch_triage:
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8593141Z       description: "Dispatch the issue triage workflow for the newly created issue"
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8593950Z       runs-on: ubuntu-latest
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8594459Z       needs: safe_outputs
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8595675Z       output: "Triage workflow dispatched"
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8596237Z       permissions:
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8596659Z         actions: write
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8597087Z         issues: write
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8597753Z       steps:
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8598385Z         - name: Dispatch triage workflow
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8599180Z           uses: actions/github-script@v9
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8599722Z           env:
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8600368Z             CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER: "${{ needs.safe_outputs.outputs.created_issue_number }}"
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8601219Z           with:
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8601628Z             script: |
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8602170Z               const issueNumber = process.env.CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER;
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8602862Z               if (!issueNumber || issueNumber === '') {
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8603999Z                 core.info('No issue was created; skipping triage dispatch');
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8604694Z                 return;
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8605114Z               }
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8605339Z 
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8605846Z               const issueNum = parseInt(issueNumber, 10);
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8606630Z               const repo = { owner: context.repo.owner, repo: context.repo.repo };
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8607167Z 
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8607646Z               const { data: issue } = await github.rest.issues.get({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum });
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8608655Z               if (issue.labels && issue.labels.length > 0) {
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8610138Z                 await github.rest.issues.setLabels({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum, labels: [] });
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8611125Z                 core.info(`Removed all labels from issue #${issueNum}`);
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8611764Z               }
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8612009Z 
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8612470Z               await github.rest.actions.createWorkflowDispatch({
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8613974Z                 ...repo,
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8614493Z                 workflow_id: 'issue-triage.lock.yml',
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8615273Z                 ref: 'main',
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8616006Z                 inputs: { issue_number: issueNumber }
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8616655Z               });
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8617191Z               core.info(`Dispatched triage for issue #${issueNum}`);

2026-04-14T00:55:08.8739561Z 
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8739733Z network: defaults
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8739972Z 
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8740149Z safe-outputs:
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8740575Z   report-failure-as-issue: false
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8741070Z   create-issue:
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8741467Z     max: 1
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8741834Z   noop:
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8742223Z     report-as-issue: false
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8742680Z   jobs:
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8743056Z     dispatch_triage:
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8743714Z       description: "Dispatch the issue triage workflow for the newly created issue"
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8744497Z       runs-on: ubuntu-latest
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8744971Z       needs: safe_outputs
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8745448Z       output: "Triage workflow dispatched"
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8745981Z       permissions:
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8746397Z         actions: write
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8746826Z         issues: write
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8747233Z       steps:
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8747641Z         - name: Dispatch triage workflow
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8748230Z           uses: actions/github-script@v9
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8748923Z           env:
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8749604Z             CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER: "${{ needs.safe_outputs.outputs.created_issue_number }}"
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8750360Z           with:
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8751526Z             script: |
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8752086Z               const issueNumber = process.env.CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER;
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8752802Z               if (!issueNumber || issueNumber === '') {
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8753511Z                 core.info('No issue was created; skipping triage dispatch');
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8754876Z                 return;
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8755426Z               }
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8755677Z 
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8755928Z               const issueNum = parseInt(issueNumber, 10);
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8757298Z               const repo = { owner: context.repo.owner, repo: context.repo.repo };
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8757845Z 
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8758319Z               const { data: issue } = await github.rest.issues.get({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum });
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8760021Z               if (issue.labels && issue.labels.length > 0) {
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8760932Z                 await github.rest.issues.setLabels({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum, labels: [] });
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8762053Z                 core.info(`Removed all labels from issue #${issueNum}`);
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8762703Z               }
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8762933Z 
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8763234Z               await github.rest.actions.createWorkflowDispatch({
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8763863Z                 ...repo,
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8764360Z                 workflow_id: 'issue-triage.lock.yml',
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8764920Z                 ref: 'main',
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8765433Z                 inputs: { issue_number: issueNumber }
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8765983Z               });
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8766484Z               core.info(`Dispatched triage for issue #${issueNum}`);
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8766958Z 
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8767118Z tools:
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8767495Z   web-fetch:
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8767876Z   github:
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8768266Z     toolsets: [issues, repos]
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8768570Z

2026-04-14T00:55:08.8769578Z [hash-debug] No template expressions (env./vars.) found in markdown body
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8770330Z [hash-debug] Canonical JSON (2168 chars):
2026-04-14T00:55:08.8795648Z {"frontmatter-text":"description: |\n  Documentation gap detector for the Azure SDK repository\n  Triggered on every push to main, analyzes diffs to identify documentation\n  gaps and files GitHub issues for Copilot coding agent to implement\n\non:\n  push:\n    branches: [main]\n  workflow_dispatch:\n\npermissions: read-all\n\nnetwork: defaults\n\nsafe-outputs:\n  report-failure-as-issue: false\n  create-issue:\n    max: 1\n  noop:\n    report-as-issue: false\n  jobs:\n    dispatch_triage:\n      description: \"Dispatch the issue triage workflow for the newly created issue\"\n      runs-on: ubuntu-latest\n      needs: safe_outputs\n      output: \"Triage workflow dispatched\"\n      permissions:\n        actions: write\n        issues: write\n      steps:\n        - name: Dispatch triage workflow\n          uses: actions/github-script@v9\n          env:\n            CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER: \"${{ needs.safe_outputs.outputs.created_issue_number }}\"\n          with:\n            script: |\n              const issueNumber = process.env.CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER;\n              if (!issueNumber || issueNumber === '') {\n                core.info('No issue was created; skipping triage dispatch');\n                return;\n              }\n\n              const issueNum = parseInt(issueNumber, 10);\n              const repo = { owner: context.repo.owner, repo: context.repo.repo };\n\n              const { data: issue } = await github.rest.issues.get({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum });\n              if (issue.labels && issue.labels.length > 0) {\n                await github.rest.issues.setLabels({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum, labels: [] });\n                core.info(`Removed all labels from issue #${issueNum}`);\n              }\n\n              await github.rest.actions.createWorkflowDispatch({\n                ...repo,\n                workflow_id: 'issue-triage.lock.yml',\n                ref: 'main',\n                inputs: { issue_number: issueNumber }\n              });\n              core.info(`Dispatched triage for issue #${issueNum}`);\n\ntools:\n  web-fetch:\n  github:\n    toolsets: [issues, repos]\n\ntimeout-minutes: 15"}
